nasb.text: On the following day, he took the cover and dipped it in water and spread it on his face, so that he died. And Hazael became king in his place.

esv.text: But the next day he took the bed cloth and dipped it in water and spread it over his face, till he died. And Hazael became king in his place.

cnv.text: 第二天，哈薛拿被窩浸在水裡，然後蒙住便．哈達的面，他就死了；於是哈薛接續他作王。

ccb.text: 第二天，哈薛拿了一床浸透水的被子，蒙在王的脸上，王窒息而死。于是哈薛篡位。
